name: OR-scope (shared month + time over a day-of-month OR weekday union)
meaning: In December only, at 23:59, on the 31st OR on any Friday. The December restriction AND the 23:59 time apply to BOTH conditions; the two are an inclusive OR (either triggers). The phrasing must NOT let 'December' or '23:59' attach to only one side, and must not read as an exclusive either/or.
candidates: en diciembre, a las 23:59, el día 31 o cualquier viernes
en diciembre a las 23:59, ya sea el día 31 o un viernes
a las 23:59, los días 31 o los viernes de diciembre
el día 31 o cualquier viernes de diciembre, a las 23:59

name: seconds + a fixed minute/time (the 'de cada minuto' is misleading when the minute is fixed)
meaning: On Mondays at 09:30, firing at second 5 and second 10 (09:30:05 and 09:30:10). It must NOT say 'of each minute', since the minute is fixed at 30 (shown by 09:30).
candidates: los lunes a las 09:30, en los segundos 5 y 10
en los segundos 5 y 10, los lunes a las 09:30
los lunes, en los segundos 5 y 10 de las 09:30

name: second-step + fixed minute + hour range + weekday (anchor the seconds to the minute)
meaning: Monday through Friday, from 09:00 to 17:30, at minute 30 of each hour, firing every 15 seconds within that minute. The 'every 15 seconds' must clearly belong to minute 30, not float as a global cadence.
candidates: de lunes a viernes, de las 09:00 a las 17:30, cada 15 segundos del minuto 30
cada 15 segundos del minuto 30 de cada hora, de las 09:00 a las 17:30, de lunes a viernes
de lunes a viernes, de las 09:00 a las 17:30, en el minuto 30 cada 15 segundos

name: minute window + specific hours list (restrictive, not additive)
meaning: Every minute from minute 0 through 30, but ONLY during the hours 09:00, 17:00, 18:00 and 19:00. The hours restrict when the minute window applies; it must not read as a cross-hour range (minute 0 of 09:00 through minute 30 of 19:00) nor as a separate additive trigger.
candidates: a las 09:00, 17:00, 18:00 y 19:00, cada minuto del 0 al 30
cada minuto del 0 al 30, solo a las 09:00, 17:00, 18:00 y 19:00
cada minuto del 0 al 30 durante las horas 09:00, 17:00, 18:00 y 19:00
